text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Thursday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Thursday, June 27. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Understood. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. School projects are fun. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Greg Holloway wants to drop scheduling portal to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. That is a common bottleneck. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of scheduling portal now and iterating later is a good compromise. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need secure messaging immediately. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Let's break this down. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Refinancing is a great leverage point. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that soldering custom sensors in the garage. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that took Lily to her medical checkup. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Ethan did great with his school homework. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
